case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC VS. ULISES FERNANDO ESTRADA CABALLERO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-22-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
